results.name: pref_longer_max_run_matched_rep_motifs
results.description: Rate of choosing the sequence with a longer maximum run, conditioned on identical number of repetition motifs.

results.name: pref_longer_max_run
results.description: Overall rate of choosing the sequence with a longer maximum run length.

results.name: pref_more_alternations
results.description: Overall rate of choosing the sequence with more overall alternations (alts).

results.name: pref_more_alts_matched_alt_motifs
results.description: Rate of choosing the sequence with more alternations, conditioned on identical number of alternating motifs.

results.name: pref_more_imbalanced
results.description: Overall rate of choosing the sequence with a greater H/T imbalance proportion.

results.name: pref_more_imbalanced_low_imbalance
results.description: Rate of choosing the more imbalanced sequence when both sequences have low imbalance (<= 0.3).
results.code:
# name: pref_more_imbalanced_low_imbalance
# description: Rate of choosing the more imbalanced sequence when both sequences have low imbalance (<= 0.3).
def test_statistic(df):
    subset_idx = (
        (df["imbalance_a"] <= 0.3)
        & (df["imbalance_b"] <= 0.3)
        & (df["imbalance_a"] != df["imbalance_b"])
    )
    subset = df[subset_idx]
    if len(subset) == 0:
        return 0.0

    more_imb_a = subset["imbalance_a"] > subset["imbalance_b"]
    more_imb_b = subset["imbalance_b"] > subset["imbalance_a"]

    return (
        subset.loc[more_imb_a, "chose_left"].sum()
        + subset.loc[more_imb_b, "chose_right"].sum()
    ) / len(subset)

results.name: pref_longer_sequence
results.description: Overall rate of choosing the sequence with the greater length.

results.name: pref_higher_periodicity_matched_motifs
results.description: Rate of choosing the sequence with higher periodicity, conditioned on identical number of repetition and alternating motifs.
results.code:
# name: pref_higher_periodicity_matched_motifs
# description: Rate of choosing the sequence with higher periodicity, conditioned on identical number of repetition and alternating motifs.
def test_statistic(df):
    subset_idx = (
        (df["alt_motifs_a"] == df["alt_motifs_b"])
        & (df["rep_motifs_a"] == df["rep_motifs_b"])
        & (df["periodicity_a"] != df["periodicity_b"])
    )
    subset = df[subset_idx]
    if len(subset) == 0:
        return 0.0

    more_per_a = subset["periodicity_a"] > subset["periodicity_b"]
    more_per_b = subset["periodicity_b"] > subset["periodicity_a"]

    return (
        subset.loc[more_per_a, "chose_left"].sum()
        + subset.loc[more_per_b, "chose_right"].sum()
    ) / len(subset)
